figure.title: UPLI Reset Timing
figure.purpose: Shows the timing relationship between UPLIReset_N assertion/deassertion and the interface signals.

technical_summary: When UPLIReset_N is asserted (active low), all Valid (*Vld, *CreditVld) and connection signals (*ClkReq, *ClkAck) deassert synchronously with UPLIClk.
UPLIReset_N must remain asserted for a minimum interval to allow the interface to reset.
After UPLIReset_N deasserts, the earliest a connection request (*ClkReq) can reassert is shown.

signals.name: *Vld, *CreditVld
signals.description: Valid signals that clear on reset.

signals.name: *ClkReq, *ClkAck
signals.description: Connection request and acknowledge signals that clear on reset.

critical_facts: Assertion of UPLIReset_N immediately clears all valid and connection-related signals synchronously to the clock.
